plan.title: QR matrix core — wrap segno and expose a binary matrix

narratives.Overview: Produce a deterministic binary matrix (list[list[bool]] or numpy ndarray) from a text/URL input, with configurable error-correction level.
narratives.Acceptance: `qr2stl.qr.build_matrix(text: str, ec: Literal['L','M','Q','H'] = 'M') -> QrMatrix` returns a `QrMatrix` value object exposing `.size: int`, `.modules: np.ndarray[bool]`, `.version: int`. Given identical text+ec, two calls return equal matrices. Invalid inputs (empty string, unknown ec) raise `ValueError` with a helpful message. Unit tests cover L/M/Q/H levels and boundary cases (very short text, near-capacity text).
narratives.Scope: src/qr2stl/qr.py — `QrMatrix` dataclass, `build_matrix()` function that calls `segno.make(..., error=ec.lower())` and extracts the module matrix. Excludes quiet-zone padding (added by geometry layer). No file I/O.
